# Getting Started (Microsegmentation API)

**Source:** https://help.zscaler.com/legacy-apis/getting-started
**Captured:** 2026-04-26 via Playwright MCP (innerText extraction of article).

---

**Note:** This page (`/legacy-apis/getting-started`) resolves to the Microsegmentation API Getting Started page, NOT the ZIA API Getting Started page. The ZIA API Getting Started is at `/legacy-apis/getting-started-zia-api`.

Legacy Zscaler APIs Help
Microsegmentation API
Getting Started

Zscaler Microsegmentation APIs enable customers and partners to visualize and manage workload traffic flows within private applications, apply fine-grained segmentation, and query operational telemetry. The platform uses the Zscaler cloud and deployed agents to collect application flow data, enforce identity-based access policies, and monitor agent and system health.

## API Workflow Overview

To authenticate and make calls to the Microsegmentation API, you must complete the following steps:

1. Ensure that all prerequisites are met.
2. Set up authentication using Postman.
3. Configure a User-Agent header.
4. Download the GraphQL Schema in Postman and use it to make API calls.
